mainEntity.name: How much money will I get for pain and suffering after a falling beam broke my arm?

acceptedAnswer.text: Workers comp does not pay for pain and suffering, but it does cover medical bills, lost wages, and permanent disability. If a third party was responsible, you may be able to sue for pain and suffering through a separate personal injury claim.
